note: No real people, no politics (MojoSOGO, 2026-07-21). packs: official packs excluded wholesale from the classic merge (inherently political/dated, plus the Jack White show pack — a pack about one musician). cards: any card referencing a real modern person by name — politicians of any country, celebrities/athletes/musicians/media figures, living or recently-living public figures — plus Hitler/Nazi-referencing cards and named hate groups. KEPT by design: enduring historical canon (Lincoln, Washington, Churchill, Einstein, Franklin, MLK, Booth, Armstrong, Genghis Khan, Dali, Picasso, Beckett), religious/mythical figures (Jesus, Moses, Muhammad, Zeus, Satan), fictional characters and titles (Darth Vader, Batman, Baby Yoda, Hannah Montana, James Bond), bands as brand names (Nickelback, Creed, Smash Mouth), and generic unnamed titles (The President, The Pope, Prime Minister). Applied case-insensitively on normalized post-FIXES text across every deck source. Removing cards shifts rating-key indexes — acceptable pre-ratings; once live, curate via the 👎 path.
